---
title: "expand_thesaurus.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\data\expand_thesaurus.py"
loc: 28
complexity: 7
logic_score: 7.88
style_score: 4.05
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.98
---

## Intent
The `expand_thesaurus.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on internal logic. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via internal logic. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [re](file://re)

### Exports
Internal logic only.
